quality_highlights.strength: Excellent progressive disclosure with clear security architecture diagram and well-organized configuration options
Extensive practical examples covering all major use cases with professional tone throughout

single_file_improvements.issue: Missing enterprise decision-making context before technical details - jumps directly into feature comparison without explaining cost, compliance, or integration considerations
single_file_improvements.user_impact: Enterprise teams need strategic guidance to choose appropriate engine based on budget, compliance requirements, and existing tooling

single_file_improvements.issue: Cryptic security error message doesn't explain why restriction exists or how to fix the path
single_file_improvements.user_impact: Users cannot self-correct path errors without understanding path traversal security implications
